failure_mode_description: The candidate forms useful structure and separates from controls on this task, but this alone is not enough for full-tier promotion.
repair_recommendation: retain_as_positive_subcase: keep task as evidence of possible structure but require additional tasks and transfer gates before promotion.

failure_mode_description: Visible input or simple history already recovers the latent target, so the task cannot prove representation formation.
repair_recommendation: repair_task_pressure: use same-visible-input/different-latent-state streams, masked-channel recovery, or held-out cross-channel binding so input-only/history controls cannot solve the task.

failure_mode_description: A fixed rolling-history or random-projection history baseline solves the task far better than the candidate, so the candidate lacks sufficient temporal state.
repair_recommendation: repair_mechanism: add an intrinsic predictive/MI objective so internal state learns temporal continuation instead of relying on fixed history features.
